task_updates.executor_notes: TimelineEditor now resolves waveform eligibility from the active resolved clip/track pair and passes both audioSrc and clipWidth into ClipAction. Verified with TimelineEditor tests covering audio-track, visual-video, muted detach-audio, and text/effect exclusions, plus a TimelineCanvas test confirming getActionRender receives the computed clip width.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: resolveWaveformAudioSrc now enforces: audio tracks require a non-zero clip volume, visual tracks require video/* MIME plus volume > 0, and text/effect clips always return undefined; TimelineEditor.test.ts also covers the detach-audio case where the muted visual clip loses its waveform and the new audio clip keeps it.
